title: solidago lepida var. polyphylla
intro: Solidago lepida var. polyphylla, also known as Mountain Golderrod, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating various respiratory issues like bronchitis and coughs. Solidago lepida var. polyphylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed in a variety of forms.
